content.cn_text: 测试4。
content.en_text: Test 4.

content.cn_text: 你将听到几段不同的录音，并需要根据所听内容回答问题。
content.en_text: You will hear a number of different recordings and you will have to answer questions on what

content.cn_text: 你所听到的内容。
content.en_text: you hear.

content.cn_text: 你会有时间阅读说明和题目，也会有机会
content.en_text: There will be time for you to read the instructions and questions and you will have a chance to

content.cn_text: 检查你的答案。
content.en_text: check your work.

content.cn_text: 所有录音只播放一遍。
content.en_text: All the recordings will be played once only.

content.cn_text: 考试分为四个部分。
content.en_text: The test is in four sections.

content.cn_text: 考试结束时，你将有十分钟时间把答案誊写到
content.en_text: At the end of the test, you will be given ten minutes to transfer your answers to an

content.cn_text: 答题卡上。
content.en_text: answer sheet.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到第一部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section 1.

content.cn_text: 第一部分。
content.en_text: Section 1.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一位女士咨询一个职位空缺。
content.en_text: You will hear a woman inquiring about a job vacancy.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间浏览第1至第4题。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 1 to 4.

content.cn_text: 现在正式开始。
content.en_text: Now we shall begin.

content.cn_text: 你需要边听边答题，因为录音不会
content.en_text: You should answer the questions as you listen because you will not hear the recording

content.cn_text: 播放第二遍。
content.en_text: a second time.

content.cn_text: 请仔细听，并回答第1至第4题。
content.en_text: Listen carefully and answer questions 1 to 4.

content.cn_text: Applicant：早上好。
content.en_text: Applicant: Good morning.

content.cn_text: 我来咨询一下你们目前是否有空缺职位。
content.en_text: I am here to inquire as to whether you have any jobs available at the moment.

content.cn_text: Advisor：有的，我们目前有几个空缺。
content.en_text: Advisor: Yes, we have several available.

content.cn_text: 你在找什么类型的工作？
content.en_text: What kind of job is it that you are looking for?

content.cn_text: Applicant：嗯，只要是兼职工作，我都可以考虑。
content.en_text: Applicant: Well, I will take any part time jobs I can get.

content.cn_text: 我现在真的很缺钱。
content.en_text: I am really strapped for cash at the moment.

content.cn_text: Advisor：好的，请稍等，我查一下我们的系统。
content.en_text: Advisor: Ok, bear with me while I have a browse on our system.

content.cn_text: 找到了。
content.en_text: Here we are.

content.cn_text: 目前我们有三个空缺职位，工作内容都很不一样。
content.en_text: We have three vacancies at the moment, all involving quite different roles.

content.cn_text: Applicant：听起来不错。
content.en_text: Applicant: That sounds promising.

content.cn_text: 都是什么职位？
content.en_text: What are they?

content.cn_text: Advisor：第一个职位是接待员。
content.en_text: Advisor: The first one is for a post as a receptionist.

content.cn_text: 这里说有接待或一般行政经验者优先，但
content.en_text: It says here that experience in reception or general administration is preferred, but

content.cn_text: 不是必须条件。
content.en_text: not essential.

content.cn_text: 你以前做过前台接待工作吗？
content.en_text: Have you worked on a reception desk previously?

content.cn_text: Applicant：没有。
content.en_text: Applicant: No, I haven't.

content.cn_text: 我很年轻时就有了孩子，所以工作经验很少。
content.en_text: I had a baby quite young, and so I have very little work experience.

content.cn_text: 你能告诉我更多细节吗？
content.en_text: Would you tell me a few more details?

content.cn_text: Advisor：当然可以。
content.en_text: Advisor: Yes, of course.

content.cn_text: 这份工作主要是提供优质客户服务，包括电话服务和面对面服务。
content.en_text: The job will be to mainly provide quality customer service, both over the phone and in person.

content.cn_text: 顾客等待时，你需要给他们提供茶点，并确保
content.en_text: When customers are waiting, you will be expected to provide them with refreshments and ensure

content.cn_text: 他们有一流的体验。
content.en_text: they have a first rate experience.

content.cn_text: Applicant：我觉得我能胜任，而且我是个很友好的人。
content.en_text: Applicant: I think I could manage that, and I am a very friendly person.

content.cn_text: Advisor：那很好。
content.en_text: Advisor: That's great.

content.cn_text: Applicant：关于工作时间，有什么信息吗？
content.en_text: Applicant: Do you have any information about the hours involved?

content.cn_text: Advisor：这里说你每周工作四天，需要上几个清晨班。
content.en_text: Advisor: It says here that you will be expected to work several early mornings, four days a week.

content.cn_text: Applicant：还有其他要求吗？
content.en_text: Applicant: Any other requirements?

content.cn_text: Advisor：有的，在正式获得这个职位前，你需要接受几周无薪培训。
content.en_text: Advisor: Yes, you'll have to go through a couple of weeks of unpaid training before qualifying

content.cn_text: 才能符合上岗资格。
content.en_text: for the post.

content.cn_text: Applicant：嗯，我不确定自己能不能完全投入这个。
content.en_text: Applicant: Hmm, I don't know if I would be able to fully commit to that.

content.cn_text: 你刚才说是每周四天吗？
content.en_text: Did you say it's four days per week?

content.cn_text: Advisor：是的，这里写着每周四天，如果提前申请，每周还可以休一天。
content.en_text: Advisor: Yes, it says here four days a week, with another day off per week when requested in advance.

content.cn_text: 还明确写着，你至少有一个工作日必须在周末。
content.en_text: It also explicitly states that at least one of your working days must fall on a weekend.

content.cn_text: Applicant：我得考虑一下，还要和我的保姆商量。
content.en_text: Applicant: I'll have to think about that and talk to my babysitter.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余对话之前，你有一些时间浏览第5至第10题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions 5-10.

content.cn_text: 现在请听录音，并回答第5至第10题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 5-10.

content.cn_text: Applicant：有没有其他开始时间晚一点的职位？
content.en_text: Applicant: Are there any other roles beginning later in the day?

content.cn_text: Advisor：有，这里有一个司机的招聘广告。
content.en_text: Advisor: Yes, there's an advertisement here for a driver.

content.cn_text: 它说你需要一张无违章记录且有效的英国驾照，没有例外。
content.en_text: It says you'll need a clean and valid UK driver's license, with absolutely no exception.

content.cn_text: Applicant：这没问题。
content.en_text: Applicant: No problems there.

content.cn_text: 我第一次就通过了驾照考试，而且从没被扣过分。
content.en_text: I passed my test first time and have never received any points.

content.cn_text: Advisor：这里还明确说明你必须超过25岁，并且至少有
content.en_text: Advisor: It also explicitly states that you must be over 25 and have been driving for at least

content.cn_text: 六年驾驶经验。
content.en_text: six years.

content.cn_text: Applicant：听起来挺有意思。
content.en_text: Applicant: That sounds quite exciting.

content.cn_text: 还有更多信息吗？
content.en_text: Is there any more information?

content.cn_text: Advisor：有，这里说工作时间很灵活，雇主愿意
content.en_text: Advisor: Yep, it says here that working hours are flexible and the employers are happy to work

content.cn_text: 根据你的个人时间安排来协调，因为他们雇了多名司机。
content.en_text: within your personal schedule since they employ multiple drivers.

content.cn_text: Applicant：那太好了。
content.en_text: Applicant: That's great.

content.cn_text: Advisor：雇主要求你承诺每周五天上午班、每周五天晚班，
content.en_text: Advisor: The employers ask for a commitment to either mornings 5 days per week, evenings 5 days

content.cn_text: 或者每周三个全天工作日。
content.en_text: per week, or three full working days per week.

content.cn_text: Applicant：我相信这些我都能应付。
content.en_text: Applicant: I'm sure I can handle all that without a problem.

content.cn_text: Advisor：除了接送雇主上下班，他们还会要求你做一些其他事情，
content.en_text: Advisor: As well as driving the employers to and from work, they will ask you to perform various duties

content.cn_text: 比如代取食品杂货，以及接他们的孩子
content.en_text: on their behalf, such as collecting the grocery shopping and picking their children up

content.cn_text: 放学。
content.en_text: from school.

content.cn_text: Applicant：他们也需要我周末工作一天吗？
content.en_text: Applicant: Do they need me to work a day on the weekend as well?

content.cn_text: Advisor：不，这里说他们只要求你工作日上班，不用周末上班。
content.en_text: Advisor: No, it says here that they only require you to work on weekdays, not weekends.

content.cn_text: Applicant：听起来挺有意思。
content.en_text: Applicant: That sounds interesting.

content.cn_text: Advisor：好的，只剩最后一个职位了，也是和客户服务相关的职位。
content.en_text: Advisor: Okay, there's only one more left, another customer service-related post.

content.cn_text: 看起来它要求你工作时间较短，但比较晚，所以可能不
content.en_text: It looks like it requires you to work short hours, quite late at night, so it might not

content.cn_text: 太适合你。
content.en_text: be suitable for you.

content.cn_text: 你还想听一下吗？
content.en_text: Do you want to hear about it anyway?

content.cn_text: Applicant：听听也无妨。
content.en_text: Applicant: Yeah, I can't do any harm.

content.cn_text: Advisor：好的，这是市中心一家电影院的收银员职位。
content.en_text: Advisor: Okay, so it's a post for a cashier in a cinema in the centre of town.

content.cn_text: 我相信你去过几次电影院，所以你大概能猜到这个职位
content.en_text: I'm sure you've been to the cinema a few times, so you can guess what kind of role it

content.cn_text: 是做什么的。
content.en_text: would be.

content.cn_text: 大多数晚上班次较短且比较晚，是5点半到10点半，
content.en_text: They're quite short and late shifts between 5.30 and 10.30 most nights, with slightly longer

content.cn_text: 周五和周六晚上的班次会稍长一些。
content.en_text: shifts on Friday and Saturday nights.

content.cn_text: Applicant：嗯，你能告诉我工作内容包括什么吗？
content.en_text: Applicant: Hmm, can you tell me what the job involves?

content.cn_text: Advisor：当然。
content.en_text: Advisor: Yes, sure.

content.cn_text: 这里说你需要售票和发票，并提供茶点。
content.en_text: It says that you'll be required to sell and dispense tickets and provide refreshments.

content.cn_text: 此外，他们要求你电脑操作快，因为你还需要接收预订。
content.en_text: Also, they ask that you be quick on the computers, since you'll also need to take bookings

content.cn_text: 通过电话处理，不过这方面会有基础培训。
content.en_text: over the phone, but you'll receive basic training for that.

content.cn_text: Applicant：他们也需要我工作日上班吗？
content.en_text: Applicant: Do they need me to work weekdays as well?

content.cn_text: Advisor：这里说如果你至少提前两周申请，他们会批准
content.en_text: Advisor: Well, it says here that if you request at least a fortnight in advance, they will grant

content.cn_text: 你在星期一休一天，但周末不能休。
content.en_text: you a day off on Mondays, but never on a weekend.

content.cn_text: Applicant：嗯。
content.en_text: Applicant: Hmm.

content.cn_text: 我会考虑一下，然后再告诉你。
content.en_text: I'll think it over and let you know later.

content.cn_text: 谢谢你的帮助。
content.en_text: Thanks for all your help.

content.cn_text: 第一部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of section 1.

content.cn_text: 你现在有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到第二部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section 2.

content.cn_text: 第二部分。
content.en_text: Section 2.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一个名为 Connection 的组织代表做讲座，内容是关于一个家庭
content.en_text: You will hear a representative from an organisation called Connection, giving a talk about a home

content.cn_text: 寄宿组织。
content.en_text: stay organisation.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间浏览第11至第14题。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 11 to 14.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1–10

items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问第一个 position available，原文说 a post as a receptionist，所以答案是 receptionist。

items.title: Duty: to provide 2. ______ service
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问 Duty: to provide ______ service，原文说 provide quality customer service。题目限制不超过两个词，可写 quality customer 或 customer。

items.title: Working hours: 3. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问 receptionist 的 working hours，原文说 several early mornings，所以答案是 early mornings。four days a week 是每周天数，不是空格内容。

items.title: Requirement: receive 4. _______ without pay
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 receive ______ without pay，原文说 unpaid training，所以答案是 training。
答案解析：第5题问第二个 position available，原文说 an advertisement here for a driver，所以答案是 driver。

items.title: Working hours: 6. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问 driver 的 working hours，原文说 working hours are flexible，所以答案是 flexible。

items.title: to collect the 7. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 duty: to collect the ______，原文说 collecting the grocery shopping，所以答案是 grocery shopping。

items.title: Day off: 8. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问 day off，原文说 weekdays, not weekends，所以答案是 weekends。注意这里是不用周末上班。

items.title: Cashier in a 9. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 Cashier in a ______，原文说 cashier in a cinema，所以答案是 cinema。

items.title: to make 10. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 duty: to make ______，原文说 take bookings over the phone，对应 make bookings，所以答案是 bookings。tickets 和 refreshments 是其他职责。

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
Job Inquiry
Type of job required: part-time

content:
Duty: to provide $2$ service
Working hours: $3$
Requirement: receive $4$ without pay
Day off: one day a week (request in advance)

Requirements: clean and valid license, 6 years experience
Working hours: $6$
Duty:
• to take employees to and from work
• to collect the $7$
• to pick up the children
Day off: $8$

Working hours: 17.30 – 22.30
Duty:
• to sell and dispense tickets
• to provide refreshments
• to make $10$
Day off: Mondays

source_label: 🍠@Listening 永不虾滑 · 仅供个人学习
source_credit: 此内容由🍠@Listening 永不虾滑整理，仅作为分享供个人使用；禁止商用、倒卖和引流。有问题请先仔细看🍠这个账号的置顶和分享贴。没有团队，不是机构，纯个人分享。督学和其他相关课程请咨询主页另一个号@心情有点虾滑（不回任何机经相关消息）。
